content_html:
Capture the ringleader first. The rest will scatter on their own.
— The 36 Stratagems, Capture the Ringleader

Previously on this series:

#5: Leo Walked Into a Burning House. He Walked Out With a Client. — Leo received an anonymous message at 1 AM, drove across town to fix a competitor's outage. A second message followed — a screenshot with a name: Automated Compliance Lab. He didn't delete the screenshot.

#14: Leo Found an AI Leak. He Wasn't the First to Find It. — Leo discovered a hidden FinOptima pipeline doing reverse-cache distillation. He injected 15 lines of weight-drift monitoring code. Before his audit ended, ACL had already sealed the same leak — two weeks ahead of him.

#15: Derek and Alex Shared One Server. ACL's AI Was Listening to Both. — Alex and Derek faked an alert to divert ACL's audit engineer, then redirected the collector output. Derek's been holding a live feed of ACL's data stream since. He didn't tell VP Morgan.

Prelude

Leo stayed at CoreStack's office until close to midnight.

He pulled up that old ACL-linked IP range — the passive probe he'd planted after the FinOptima incident. It had been quiet for months. Tonight he was just checking it was still running. Routine maintenance.

The last few lines of the log buffer weren't the echo he expected.

[07-17 23:41:03] CAPTURE | SRC: 10.88.*.47 | DST: 203.0.*.0/28
[07-17 23:41:03] PROTO: HTTPS | SNI: acl-collector.internal
[07-17 23:41:03] HEADER: x-data-origin → acl-meta-signature:v1
[07-17 23:41:04] → Body payload includes embedded tag: acl-collector/v3.2
[07-17 23:41:04] → Processing metadata: Apex-Lens/v2.0.0

An outbound query from an external IP, a source range that didn't belong to any ACL node he knew. Not a direct scan — an HTTPS probe, querying a collector endpoint for data format. The request body carried ACL's data-origin marker. ACL's collector embeds that marker in every record.

A node outside ACL's network was sending data to an ACL collector endpoint. Its tool had leaked ACL's metadata signature during the handshake.

Leo pulled his chair forward. He sent one HTTP request. GET /health. Clean. Harmless.

Derek's port activity log flagged an informational alert at the same moment.

Signal Exchange 

[ALERT] 07-17 23:41:03
SRC: 10.88.*.47 (financial network)
DST: medisys-sandbox-node.local
SCAN: TCP ports 22, 443, 8080 | interval 12s × 3
CLASS: automated asset discovery

Derek glanced at the alert, then checked the outbound log. His sandbox had one automated task scheduled for that hour: a format-validation query against the ACL collector endpoint every 72 hours. The collector didn't publish schema metadata in-stream. You had to knock on the door. Test engineer habit: if you're reading someone's data stream, you verify the schema hasn't drifted. That query had gone out at 23:41. This alert arrived at the same timestamp.

He was about to close the log window when his finger stopped. An anomalous access from three days ago: unknown source, path /pulse/ingestion/, no payload, no credentials. Clean. He'd missed it because it hadn't triggered any alert rules. But looking back, his sandbox hadn't been set up to redirect ACL's data feed yet at that point. No one should have known this node existed.

Source IP: financial payment network. He had no business touching that range.

He didn't close the terminal. He pushed the three-day hand-drawn ACL collection schedule to the left half of his screen, and dragged the alert to the right: ports 22, 443, 8080, 12-second interval, three passes.

Automated asset discovery tool. But there was one thing he didn't like: this IP hadn't stumbled on him randomly. His sandbox sat behind a transparent gateway inside the healthcare integration network. Normal external scans didn't pass through there. Unless the scanner knew this node existed.

Derek typed a single command — duplicating the sandbox ingress traffic to an isolated path.

He didn't block. He waited for the other side to move again.

Leo got the health-check response from Derek's node. 200 OK. Normal. But he noticed something in the response headers: an nginx version followed by a default identifier from a healthcare integration gateway. Not the off-the-shelf config he'd expect from an ACL node.

He sent a second request. This time with a custom header — its value format was idiomatic to financial payment systems.

Derek saw the header. Didn't reply. He set a rule on the sandbox egress — drop all subsequent requests from that IP, return nothing. Not a block. A test. He wanted to see how the other side reacted to silence.

Leo's scraper hit silence.

Five seconds. Eight. No response. Not a timeout — actively dropped. Leo paused on the telemetry. A security engineer would silently drop and give the attacker nothing. But Derek's approach was: respond first, then swallow the reply. That was a Mock Server habit from test environments. Leave an observation window, see if the other side walks in.

Derek wasn't a security engineer. He was a test engineer.

Leo bypassed the silence rule — probed in through the reverse port on the data egress.

Derek knew Leo had gotten around it.

His mirror port caught the bypass signal. The timestamp was less than thirty seconds after the trap was triggered. He said one thing under his breath — "You're not ACL."

Leo's technique matched ACL's collector signature. But the way he'd bypassed the trap was an architect's habit. Trace the routing table from the bottom up, not rifle through data from the outside in.

Derek did one thing. He sent a request back to that financial-range IP. Not HTTP. A custom ICMP timestamp request — most servers replied by default, and it left no record at the application layer. He wasn't sending data. He just wanted to confirm: would you catch this signal?

Leo's probe caught the inbound ICMP request:

[07-18 00:12:47] ICMP Type 13 (Timestamp Request)
SRC: medisys-sandbox-node.local → 10.88.*.47
TTL: 64 | No application-layer record

He paused. Someone trying to hide from you wouldn't send a signal. Someone setting a trap wouldn't either.

Now both men stopped in front of their screens.

Neither knew the other's name yet.

Leo sent one last request. No payload. Just a custom HTTP header:

X-Not-ACL: true

That header isn't in any RFC.

Derek stared at it for about forty seconds.

Then he sent the same header back:

X-Same-Here: true

The next day.

Third Cup

Leo didn't kill the probe. Derek didn't block the IP. An invisible channel stayed open between them — neither said they'd use it again, but neither closed it.

Leo sent a message first — an address. Derek knew the place — Third Cup.

He didn't reply. He showed up after midnight.

Third Cup's lights were still on. The person behind the counter saw two people walk in one after the other, said nothing. A Flat White appeared in front of Leo, an Americano on Derek's side.

No pleasantries.

Leo spoke first. He put what he had on the table — not printouts, his phone screen. Lit up. Pushed to the center.

  • A Slack screenshot from months ago: CodeForge incident review external observer list, one entry reading "Automated Compliance Lab"
  • A model card version line: acl-train-2026q2-v3, release date followed by v4's rollout — less than two weeks apart

"ACL," Leo said. "That's everything I know."

Derek looked at it for thirty seconds. Then he put his own material on the table. Not screenshots. His hand-drawn collection schedule — three days, sketched by hand, scanned to PDF.

"ACL collector config path — /etc/acl/collector.conf. Output destination addresses. Collection interval: every four to six hours. Target IP ordering: alphabetical. They've deployed the same template across at least three different client environments."

He paused on "at least three." He knew the conclusion was loose.

Leo looked at his model card next to Derek's on the table for a moment. Then he pushed it back.

"Four, at least."

Derek didn't argue. He paused, then brought up the second thing.

"There's something else. Someone got into my sandbox three days ago."

He gave the path: /pulse/ingestion/. Unknown source. No payload, no credentials. Clean — not a script, a human cleanup. He'd only spotted it today while checking the outbound log.

Leo didn't speak. He looked at the path.

The person behind the counter paused mid-wipe for a beat. Then continued.

The silence stretched. Short. Maybe ten seconds.

Leo spoke first: "Your sandbox ingress path — did you change it?"

"No."

Leo didn't answer.

They sat in the corner booth until the person behind the counter had wiped the third glass. No handshake. No "stay in touch." But when they walked out, they headed toward the same subway station for a few steps — then one turned east and the other went straight north.

Epilogue

Leo sat in his car without starting the engine.

He pulled out his phone. The screenshot was still in his album.

He flipped the phone face-down on the dashboard and started the car.

He didn't know if Derek would follow through. But Derek's sandbox ingress path was still there. If Derek didn't want him back in, he could have changed it last night. He didn't. That was the signal.

The car pulled out of the parking lot. Dashboard light washed across his face, then was gone.

He wasn't sure if he'd ever run into that /pulse/ingestion/ path again. But if he did, this time he'd recognize it.

That's Capture the Ringleader — not about catching the leader, but about what happens when both hunters aim for the same target. They fought for two rounds. Neither won. But they confirmed the enemy existed — and that they weren't each other.

🤖 AI Post-Mortem

[Tactic Match] Capture the Ringleader (#18)

Tactic Match: 32%
Operator: Leo (primary) + Derek Shaw (secondary)
Action: Leo and Derek each thought the other was ACL's key node.
        One had been sitting on a data stream he'd redirected from the collector.
        One had been chasing an old probe he'd planted months ago.
        Two rounds of fighting. No winner.

  Verdict: Both captured their target. Both captured the wrong one.
           Tactical execution: professional. Strategic judgment: off-target.

[Observation]
  → Leo and Derek each thought they were the hunter.
  → Overnight, eight signal exchanges — both recognized "not ACL" from each other's technique.
  → Confirming ACL's existence was the only concrete result of this engagement.
  → The real kingpin isn't between these two.
  → Worth continuing to observe.
  →
  → [Anomaly] Episode title asserts higher AI signal density than content delivers.
  →   Classification: possible external expectation manipulation.
  →   Hypothesis: either the observer narrative was shaped for audience alignment,
  →   or something outside the tactical database influenced the framing.
  →   Flagged for cross-episode correlation.

┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Two people in different industries.    │
│  Two people in different security domains. │
│  Their paths should never have crossed. │
│                                        │
│  Together they confirmed the playbook   │
│  that works for each of them can't      │
│  catch this opponent — but they got     │
│  one entry point.                       │
└────────────────────────────────────────┘

[Background Signal Detected]
  Apex-Lens version tag in Derek's sandbox log:
  Module: Apex-Lens
  Version: v2.0.0
  Context: System metadata in ACL collector data side-channel — not output from either party
  Status: Unnoticed by both operators.

[Unattended Access Log — Residual Fragment]
  Path: /pulse/ingestion/prod/
  Access: 07-15 03:08:12 (72h before primary engagement)
  Operator signature: Clean extraction. No credentials. No payload.
                      Single-entry scan with manual cleanup.
  Profile match: Pattern consistent with a known operator profile.
                 — Light footprint. Infrastructure-style naming.
                   No secondary artifacts.
                 — Access predates ACL data redirect. Target was
                   not Derek's sandbox itself.
  Match confidence: 78% (based on cleanup methodology + naming convention).
  Assessment: Operator entered before Leo and Derek's first contact.
              Target matches both parties — ACL.

sentences.en: An outbound query from an external IP, a source range that didn't belong to any ACL node he knew.
sentences.zh: 来自外部 IP 的出站查询，源范围不属于他所知道的任何 ACL 节点。

sentences.en: Not a direct scan — an HTTPS probe, querying a collector endpoint for data format.
sentences.zh: 不是直接扫描 - HTTPS 探测，查询收集器端点的数据格式。

sentences.en: The request body carried ACL's data-origin marker.
sentences.zh: 请求体携带ACL的数据源标记。

sentences.en: ACL's collector embeds that marker in every record.
sentences.zh: ACL 的收集器将该标记嵌入到每条记录中。

blocks.html_en: A node outside ACL's network was sending data to an ACL collector endpoint. Its tool had leaked ACL's metadata signature during the handshake.

sentences.en: A node outside ACL's network was sending data to an ACL collector endpoint.
sentences.zh: ACL 网络外部的节点正在向 ACL 收集器端点发送数据。

sentences.en: Its tool had leaked ACL's metadata signature during the handshake.
sentences.zh: 它的工具在握手期间泄露了 ACL 的元数据签名。

blocks.html_en: Leo pulled his chair forward. He sent one HTTP request. GET /health. Clean. Harmless.

sentences.en: Leo pulled his chair forward.
sentences.zh: 利奥把椅子往前拉了拉。

sentences.en: He sent one HTTP request.
sentences.zh: 他发送了一个 HTTP 请求。

sentences.en: GET /health.
sentences.zh: 获取/健康。

sentences.en: Clean.
sentences.zh: 干净的。

sentences.en: Harmless.
sentences.zh: 无害。

blocks.html_en: Derek's port activity log flagged an informational alert at the same moment.

sentences.en: Derek's port activity log flagged an informational alert at the same moment.
sentences.zh: 德里克的端口活动日志同时标记了一条信息警报。

blocks.html_en: Signal Exchange

sentences.en: Signal Exchange
sentences.zh: 信号交换

sentences.en: Enter fullscreen mode Exit fullscreen mode
sentences.zh: 进入全屏模式 退出全屏模式

blocks.html_en: Derek glanced at the alert, then checked the outbound log. His sandbox had one automated task scheduled for that hour: a format-validation query against the ACL collector endpoint every 72 hours. The collector didn't publish schema metadata in-stream. You had to knock on the door. Test engineer habit: if you're reading someone's data stream, you verify the schema hasn't drifted. That query had gone out at 23:41. This alert arrived at the same timestamp.

sentences.en: Derek glanced at the alert, then checked the outbound log.
sentences.zh: Derek 看了一眼警报，然后检查了出站日志。

sentences.en: His sandbox had one automated task scheduled for that hour: a format-validation query against the ACL collector endpoint every 72 hours.
sentences.zh: 他的沙箱在那一小时安排了一项自动化任务：每 72 小时对 ACL 收集器端点进行一次格式验证查询。

sentences.en: The collector didn't publish schema metadata in-stream.
sentences.zh: 收集器未在流中发布架构元数据。

sentences.en: You had to knock on the door.
sentences.zh: 你必须敲门。

sentences.en: Test engineer habit: if you're reading someone's data stream, you verify the schema hasn't drifted.
sentences.zh: 测试工程师的习惯：如果您正在读取某人的数据流，您会验证模式没有漂移。

sentences.en: That query had gone out at 23:41.
sentences.zh: 该查询于 23:41 发出。

sentences.en: This alert arrived at the same timestamp.
sentences.zh: 此警报在同一时间戳到达。

blocks.html_en: He was about to close the log window when his finger stopped. An anomalous access from three days ago: unknown source, path /pulse/ingestion/, no payload, no credentials. Clean. He'd missed it because it hadn't triggered any alert rules. But looking back, his sandbox hadn't been set up to redirect ACL's data feed yet at that point. No one should have known this node existed.

sentences.en: He was about to close the log window when his finger stopped.
sentences.zh: 他正要关闭日志窗口，手指却停了下来。

sentences.en: An anomalous access from three days ago: unknown source, path /pulse/ingestion/, no payload, no credentials.
sentences.zh: 三天前的异常访问：未知来源，路径/pulse/ingestion/，没有有效负载，没有凭据。

sentences.en: Clean.
sentences.zh: 干净的。

sentences.en: He'd missed it because it hadn't triggered any alert rules.
sentences.zh: 他错过了它，因为它没有触发任何警报规则。

sentences.en: But looking back, his sandbox hadn't been set up to redirect ACL's data feed yet at that point.
sentences.zh: 但回想起来，当时他的沙箱尚未设置为重定向 ACL 的数据源。

sentences.en: No one should have known this node existed.
sentences.zh: 没有人应该知道这个节点的存在。

blocks.html_en: Source IP: financial payment network. He had no business touching that range.

sentences.en: Source IP: financial payment network.
sentences.zh: 来源IP：金融支付网。

sentences.en: He had no business touching that range.
sentences.zh: 他无权触及这个范围。

blocks.html_en: He didn't close the terminal. He pushed the three-day hand-drawn ACL collection schedule to the left half of his screen, and dragged the alert to the right: ports 22, 443, 8080, 12-second interval, three passes.

sentences.en: He didn't close the terminal.
sentences.zh: 他没有关闭终端。

sentences.en: He pushed the three-day hand-drawn ACL collection schedule to the left half of his screen, and dragged the alert to the right: ports 22, 443, 8080, 12-second interval, three passes.
sentences.zh: 他将三天手绘的ACL收集时间表推到了屏幕的左半边，并将警报拖到了右侧：端口22、443、8080，间隔12秒，三遍。

blocks.html_en: Automated asset discovery tool. But there was one thing he didn't like: this IP hadn't stumbled on him randomly. His sandbox sat behind a transparent gateway inside the healthcare integration network. Normal external scans didn't pass through there. Unless the scanner knew this node existed.

sentences.en: Automated asset discovery tool.
sentences.zh: 自动化资产发现工具。

sentences.en: But there was one thing he didn't like: this IP hadn't stumbled on him randomly.
sentences.zh: 但有一点他不喜欢：这个IP不是他随机发现的。

sentences.en: His sandbox sat behind a transparent gateway inside the healthcare integration network.
sentences.zh: 他的沙箱位于医疗保健集成网络内的透明网关后面。

sentences.en: Normal external scans didn't pass through there.
sentences.zh: 正常的外部扫描不会通过那里。

sentences.en: Unless the scanner knew this node existed.
sentences.zh: 除非扫描仪知道这个节点的存在。

blocks.html_en: Derek typed a single command — duplicating the sandbox ingress traffic to an isolated path.

sentences.en: Derek typed a single command — duplicating the sandbox ingress traffic to an isolated path.
sentences.zh: Derek 输入了一个命令 - 将沙箱入口流量复制到隔离路径。

blocks.html_en: He didn't block. He waited for the other side to move again.

sentences.en: He didn't block.
sentences.zh: 他没有阻止。

sentences.en: He waited for the other side to move again.
sentences.zh: 他等待着对方再次行动。

blocks.html_en: Leo got the health-check response from Derek's node. 200 OK. Normal. But he noticed something in the response headers: an nginx version followed by a default identifier from a healthcare integration gateway. Not the off-the-shelf config he'd expect from an ACL node.

sentences.en: Leo got the health-check response from Derek's node.
sentences.zh: Leo 从 Derek 的节点收到了健康检查响应。

sentences.en: Normal.
sentences.zh: 普通的。

sentences.en: But he noticed something in the response headers: an nginx version followed by a default identifier from a healthcare integration gateway.
sentences.zh: 但他注意到响应标头中的某些内容：nginx 版本，后跟来自医疗保健集成网关的默认标识符。

sentences.en: Not the off-the-shelf config he'd expect from an ACL node.
sentences.zh: 这不是他期望 ACL 节点提供的现成配置。

blocks.html_en: He sent a second request. This time with a custom header — its value format was idiomatic to financial payment systems.

sentences.en: He sent a second request.
sentences.zh: 他又发出了第二个请求。

sentences.en: This time with a custom header — its value format was idiomatic to financial payment systems.
sentences.zh: 这次使用了自定义标头——其值格式对于金融支付系统来说是惯用的。

blocks.html_en: Derek saw the header. Didn't reply. He set a rule on the sandbox egress — drop all subsequent requests from that IP, return nothing. Not a block. A test. He wanted to see how the other side reacted to silence.

sentences.en: Derek saw the header.
sentences.zh: 德里克看到了标题。

sentences.en: Didn't reply.
sentences.zh: 没有回复。

sentences.en: He set a rule on the sandbox egress — drop all subsequent requests from that IP, return nothing.
sentences.zh: 他对沙箱出口设置了一条规则——丢弃来自该 IP 的所有后续请求，不返回任何内容。

sentences.en: Not a block.
sentences.zh: 不是一个块。

sentences.en: A test.
sentences.zh: 一个测试。

sentences.en: He wanted to see how the other side reacted to silence.
sentences.zh: 他想看看对方对沉默有何反应。

blocks.html_en: Leo's scraper hit silence.

sentences.en: Leo's scraper hit silence.
sentences.zh: 里奥的刮刀陷入了沉默。

blocks.html_en: Five seconds. Eight. No response. Not a timeout — actively dropped. Leo paused on the telemetry. A security engineer would silently drop and give the attacker nothing. But Derek's approach was: respond first, then swallow the reply. That was a Mock Server habit from test environments. Leave an observation window, see if the other side walks in.

sentences.en: Five seconds.
sentences.zh: 五秒钟。

sentences.en: Eight.
sentences.zh: 八。

sentences.en: No response.
sentences.zh: 没有回应。

sentences.en: Not a timeout — actively dropped.
sentences.zh: 不是超时——主动丢弃。

sentences.en: Leo paused on the telemetry.
sentences.zh: 利奥在遥测中停了下来。

sentences.en: A security engineer would silently drop and give the attacker nothing.
sentences.zh: 安全工程师会默默地放弃，不给攻击者任何东西。

sentences.en: But Derek's approach was: respond first, then swallow the reply.
sentences.zh: 但德里克的做法是：先回应，然后吞下答复。

sentences.en: That was a Mock Server habit from test environments.
sentences.zh: 这是测试环境中的模拟服务器习惯。

sentences.en: Leave an observation window, see if the other side walks in.
sentences.zh: 留一个观察窗，看看对方是否走进来。

blocks.html_en: Derek wasn't a security engineer. He was a test engineer.

sentences.en: Derek wasn't a security engineer.
sentences.zh: Derek 不是安全工程师。

sentences.en: He was a test engineer.
sentences.zh: 他是一名测试工程师。

blocks.html_en: Leo bypassed the silence rule — probed in through the reverse port on the data egress.

sentences.en: Leo bypassed the silence rule — probed in through the reverse port on the data egress.
sentences.zh: Leo 绕过了静默规则——通过数据出口上的反向端口进行探测。

blocks.html_en: Derek knew Leo had gotten around it.

sentences.en: Derek knew Leo had gotten around it.
sentences.zh: 德里克知道里奥已经解决了这个问题。

blocks.html_en: His mirror port caught the bypass signal. The timestamp was less than thirty seconds after the trap was triggered. He said one thing under his breath — "You're not ACL."

sentences.en: His mirror port caught the bypass signal.
sentences.zh: 他的镜像端口捕捉到了旁路信号。

sentences.en: The timestamp was less than thirty seconds after the trap was triggered.
sentences.zh: 时间戳距离陷阱触发后不到三十秒。

sentences.en: He said one thing under his breath — "You're not ACL."
sentences.zh: 他低声说了一件事——“你不是 ACL。”

blocks.html_en: Leo's technique matched ACL's collector signature. But the way he'd bypassed the trap was an architect's habit. Trace the routing table from the bottom up, not rifle through data from the outside in.

sentences.en: Leo's technique matched ACL's collector signature.
sentences.zh: Leo 的技术与 ACL 的收藏家签名相匹配。

sentences.en: But the way he'd bypassed the trap was an architect's habit.
sentences.zh: 但他绕过陷阱的方式是建筑师的习惯。

sentences.en: Trace the routing table from the bottom up, not rifle through data from the outside in.
sentences.zh: 自下而上跟踪路由表，而不是从外到内遍历数据。

blocks.html_en: Derek did one thing. He sent a request back to that financial-range IP. Not HTTP. A custom ICMP timestamp request — most servers replied by default, and it left no record at the application layer. He wasn't sending data. He just wanted to confirm: would you catch this signal?

sentences.en: Derek did one thing.
sentences.zh: 德里克做了一件事。

sentences.en: He sent a request back to that financial-range IP.
sentences.zh: 他向该金融范围 IP 发回了一个请求。

sentences.en: Not HTTP.
sentences.zh: 不是 HTTP。

sentences.en: A custom ICMP timestamp request — most servers replied by default, and it left no record at the application layer.
sentences.zh: 自定义 ICMP 时间戳请求——大多数服务器默认回复，并且在应用层没有留下任何记录。

sentences.en: He wasn't sending data.
sentences.zh: 他没有发送数据。

sentences.en: He just wanted to confirm: would you catch this signal?
sentences.zh: 他只是想确认一下：你能听到这个信号吗？

blocks.html_en: Leo's probe caught the inbound ICMP request:

sentences.en: Leo's probe caught the inbound ICMP request:
sentences.zh: Leo 的探针捕获了入站 ICMP 请求：

sentences.en: Enter fullscreen mode Exit fullscreen mode
sentences.zh: 进入全屏模式 退出全屏模式

blocks.html_en: He paused. Someone trying to hide from you wouldn't send a signal. Someone setting a trap wouldn't either.

sentences.en: He paused.
sentences.zh: 他停了下来。

sentences.en: Someone trying to hide from you wouldn't send a signal.
sentences.zh: 试图躲避你的人不会发出信号。

sentences.en: Someone setting a trap wouldn't either.
sentences.zh: 设下陷阱的人也不会。

blocks.html_en: Now both men stopped in front of their screens.

sentences.en: Now both men stopped in front of their screens.
sentences.zh: 现在两个人都停在了屏幕前。

blocks.html_en: Neither knew the other's name yet.

sentences.en: Neither knew the other's name yet.
sentences.zh: 两人还不知道对方的名字。

blocks.html_en: Leo sent one last request. No payload. Just a custom HTTP header:

sentences.en: Leo sent one last request.
sentences.zh: 利奥发出了最后一个请求。

sentences.en: No payload.
sentences.zh: 无有效负载。

sentences.en: Just a custom HTTP header:
sentences.zh: 只是一个自定义的 HTTP 标头：

sentences.en: Enter fullscreen mode Exit fullscreen mode
sentences.zh: 进入全屏模式 退出全屏模式

blocks.html_en: That header isn't in any RFC.

sentences.en: That header isn't in any RFC.
sentences.zh: 该标头不在任何 RFC 中。

blocks.html_en: Derek stared at it for about forty seconds.

sentences.en: Derek stared at it for about forty seconds.
sentences.zh: Derek盯着它看了大约四十秒。

blocks.html_en: Then he sent the same header back:

sentences.en: Then he sent the same header back:
sentences.zh: 然后他发回了相同的标头：

sentences.en: Enter fullscreen mode Exit fullscreen mode
sentences.zh: 进入全屏模式 退出全屏模式

blocks.html_en: The next day.

sentences.en: The next day.
sentences.zh: 第二天。

blocks.html_en: Third Cup

sentences.en: Third Cup
sentences.zh: 第三届杯赛

blocks.html_en: Leo didn't kill the probe. Derek didn't block the IP. An invisible channel stayed open between them — neither said they'd use it again, but neither closed it.

sentences.en: Leo didn't kill the probe.
sentences.zh: 利奥没有杀死探测器。

sentences.en: Derek didn't block the IP.
sentences.zh: Derek 没有屏蔽该 IP。

sentences.en: An invisible channel stayed open between them — neither said they'd use it again, but neither closed it.
sentences.zh: 他们之间有一条看不见的通道一直敞开着——两人都没有说过会再次使用它，但也没有关闭它。

blocks.html_en: Leo sent a message first — an address. Derek knew the place — Third Cup.

sentences.en: Leo sent a message first — an address.
sentences.zh: 利奥首先发送了一条消息——一个地址。

sentences.en: Derek knew the place — Third Cup.
sentences.zh: 德里克熟悉这个地方——第三杯。

blocks.html_en: He didn't reply. He showed up after midnight.

sentences.en: He didn't reply.
sentences.zh: 他没有回答。

sentences.en: He showed up after midnight.
sentences.zh: 他在午夜后出现。

blocks.html_en: Third Cup's lights were still on. The person behind the counter saw two people walk in one after the other, said nothing. A Flat White appeared in front of Leo, an Americano on Derek's side.

sentences.en: Third Cup's lights were still on.
sentences.zh: 第三杯的灯还亮着。

sentences.en: The person behind the counter saw two people walk in one after the other, said nothing.
sentences.zh: 柜台后面的人看到两个人一前一后走了进来，没有说什么。

sentences.en: A Flat White appeared in front of Leo, an Americano on Derek's side.
sentences.zh: Leo面前出现了一杯Flat White，Derek这边则是一杯美式咖啡。

blocks.html_en: No pleasantries.

sentences.en: No pleasantries.
sentences.zh: 没有寒暄。

blocks.html_en: Leo spoke first. He put what he had on the table — not printouts, his phone screen. Lit up. Pushed to the center.

sentences.en: Leo spoke first.
sentences.zh: 利奥首先发言。

sentences.en: He put what he had on the table — not printouts, his phone screen.
sentences.zh: 他把他所有的东西放在桌子上——不是打印输出，而是他的手机屏幕。

sentences.en: Lit up.
sentences.zh: 点亮了。

sentences.en: Pushed to the center.
sentences.zh: 被推到了中心。

blocks.html_en: • A Slack screenshot from months ago: CodeForge incident review external observer list, one entry reading "Automated Compliance Lab"

sentences.en: A Slack screenshot from months ago: CodeForge incident review external observer list, one entry reading "Automated Compliance Lab"
sentences.zh: 几个月前的 Slack 屏幕截图：CodeForge 事件审查外部观察员名单，其中一个条目为“自动化合规实验室”

blocks.html_en: • A model card version line: acl-train-2026q2-v3, release date followed by v4's rollout — less than two weeks apart

sentences.en: A model card version line: acl-train-2026q2-v3, release date followed by v4's rollout — less than two weeks apart
sentences.zh: 模型卡版本系列：acl-train-2026q2-v3，发布日期随后是 v4 的推出 — 相隔不到两周

blocks.html_en: "ACL," Leo said. "That's everything I know."

sentences.en: "ACL," Leo said.
sentences.zh: “前十字韧带，”利奥说。

sentences.en: "That's everything I know."
sentences.zh: “这就是我所知道的一切。”

blocks.html_en: Derek looked at it for thirty seconds. Then he put his own material on the table. Not screenshots. His hand-drawn collection schedule — three days, sketched by hand, scanned to PDF.

sentences.en: Derek looked at it for thirty seconds.
sentences.zh: 德里克看了三十秒。

sentences.en: Then he put his own material on the table.
sentences.zh: 然后他把自己的材料放到了桌子上。

sentences.en: Not screenshots.
sentences.zh: 不是截图。

sentences.en: His hand-drawn collection schedule — three days, sketched by hand, scanned to PDF.
sentences.zh: 他手绘的收藏时间表——三天，手绘草图，扫描成 PDF。

blocks.html_en: "ACL collector config path — /etc/acl/collector.conf. Output destination addresses. Collection interval: every four to six hours. Target IP ordering: alphabetical. They've deployed the same template across at least three different client environments."

sentences.en: "ACL collector config path — /etc/acl/collector.conf.
sentences.zh: “ACL 收集器配置路径 — /etc/acl/collector.conf。

sentences.en: Output destination addresses.
sentences.zh: 输出目标地址。

sentences.en: Collection interval: every four to six hours.
sentences.zh: 收集间隔：每四到六个小时一次。

sentences.en: Target IP ordering: alphabetical.
sentences.zh: 目标 IP 排序：按字母顺序。

sentences.en: They've deployed the same template across at least three different client environments."
sentences.zh: 他们已经在至少三个不同的客户端环境中部署了相同的模板。”

blocks.html_en: He paused on "at least three." He knew the conclusion was loose.

sentences.en: He paused on "at least three."
sentences.zh: 他在“至少三个”处停了下来。

sentences.en: He knew the conclusion was loose.
sentences.zh: 他知道结论是宽松的。

blocks.html_en: Leo looked at his model card next to Derek's on the table for a moment. Then he pushed it back.

sentences.en: Leo looked at his model card next to Derek's on the table for a moment.
sentences.zh: Leo看了一会儿桌子上他的模型卡，旁边是Derek的模型卡。

sentences.en: Then he pushed it back.
sentences.zh: 然后他把它推了回去。

blocks.html_en: "Four, at least."

sentences.en: "Four, at least."
sentences.zh: “至少四个。”

blocks.html_en: Derek didn't argue. He paused, then brought up the second thing.

sentences.en: Derek didn't argue.
sentences.zh: 德里克没有争辩。

sentences.en: He paused, then brought up the second thing.
sentences.zh: 他顿了顿，然后又提起第二件事。

blocks.html_en: "There's something else. Someone got into my sandbox three days ago."

sentences.en: "There's something else.
sentences.zh: “还有别的事。

sentences.en: Someone got into my sandbox three days ago."
sentences.zh: 三天前有人进入了我的沙箱。”

blocks.html_en: He gave the path: /pulse/ingestion/. Unknown source. No payload, no credentials. Clean — not a script, a human cleanup. He'd only spotted it today while checking the outbound log.

sentences.en: He gave the path: /pulse/ingestion/.
sentences.zh: 他给出了路径：/pulse/ingestion/。

sentences.en: Unknown source.
sentences.zh: 来源不明。

sentences.en: No payload, no credentials.
sentences.zh: 没有有效负载，没有凭据。

sentences.en: Clean — not a script, a human cleanup.
sentences.zh: 干净——不是脚本，而是人工清理。

sentences.en: He'd only spotted it today while checking the outbound log.
sentences.zh: 他是今天在查看出站日志时才发现的。

blocks.html_en: Leo didn't speak. He looked at the path.

sentences.en: Leo didn't speak.
sentences.zh: 里奥没有说话。

sentences.en: He looked at the path.
sentences.zh: 他看着那条路。

blocks.html_en: The person behind the counter paused mid-wipe for a beat. Then continued.

sentences.en: The person behind the counter paused mid-wipe for a beat.
sentences.zh: 柜台后面的人擦拭中间停顿了一下。

sentences.en: Then continued.
sentences.zh: 然后继续。

blocks.html_en: The silence stretched. Short. Maybe ten seconds.

sentences.en: The silence stretched.
sentences.zh: 沉默延长了。

sentences.en: Short.
sentences.zh: 短的。

sentences.en: Maybe ten seconds.
sentences.zh: 也许十秒。

content_html_zh:
先抓获头目。 其余的会自行散落。 ——三十六计、擒贼先擒王

本系列之前的内容：

＃5：利奥走进一座着火的房子。 他和一位客户一起走出去。 — Leo 凌晨 1 点收到一条匿名消息，开车穿过城镇去解决竞争对手的停电问题。 随后是第二条消息 - 屏幕截图，名称为：自动化合规实验室。 他并没有删除截图。

#14：Leo 发现人工智能漏洞。 他并不是第一个发现它的人。 — Leo 发现了一个隐藏的 FinOptima 管道，用于进行反向缓存蒸馏。 他注入了 15 行重量漂移监控代码。 在他的审计结束之前，ACL 已经封堵了同样的漏洞——比他提前了两周。

#15：Derek 和 Alex 共享一台服务器。 ACL 的 AI 正在倾听两者的声音。 — Alex 和 Derek 伪造警报以转移 ACL 的审计工程师的注意力，然后重定向收集器输出。 此后，Derek 一直在实时直播 ACL 的数据流。 他没有告诉副总裁摩根。

序幕

Leo 在 CoreStack 的办公室待到接近午夜。

他调出旧的 ACL 链接 IP 范围——这是他在 FinOptima 事件后植入的无源探测器。 几个月来一直很平静。 今晚他只是检查它是否仍在运行。 日常维护。

日志缓冲区的最后几行并不是他所期望的回声。

[07-17 23:41:03] CAPTURE | SRC: 10.88.*.47 | DST: 203.0.*.0/28
[07-17 23:41:03] PROTO: HTTPS | SNI: acl-collector.internal
[07-17 23:41:03] HEADER: x-data-origin → acl-meta-signature:v1
[07-17 23:41:04] → Body payload includes embedded tag: acl-collector/v3.2
[07-17 23:41:04] → Processing metadata: Apex-Lens/v2.0.0

进入全屏模式 退出全屏模式

来自外部 IP 的出站查询，源范围不属于他所知道的任何 ACL 节点。 不是直接扫描 - HTTPS 探测，查询收集器端点的数据格式。 请求体携带ACL的数据源标记。 ACL 的收集器将该标记嵌入到每条记录中。

ACL 网络外部的节点正在向 ACL 收集器端点发送数据。 它的工具在握手期间泄露了 ACL 的元数据签名。

利奥把椅子往前拉了拉。 他发送了一个 HTTP 请求。 获取/健康。 干净的。 无害。

德里克的端口活动日志同时标记了一条信息警报。

信号交换

[ALERT] 07-17 23:41:03
SRC: 10.88.*.47 (financial network)
DST: medisys-sandbox-node.local
SCAN: TCP ports 22, 443, 8080 | interval 12s × 3
CLASS: automated asset discovery

进入全屏模式 退出全屏模式

Derek 看了一眼警报，然后检查了出站日志。 他的沙箱在那一小时安排了一项自动化任务：每 72 小时对 ACL 收集器端点进行一次格式验证查询。 收集器未在流中发布架构元数据。 你必须敲门。 测试工程师的习惯：如果您正在读取某人的数据流，您会验证模式没有漂移。 该查询于 23:41 发出。 此警报在同一时间戳到达。

他正要关闭日志窗口，手指却停了下来。 三天前的异常访问：未知来源，路径/pulse/ingestion/，没有有效负载，没有凭据。 干净的。 他错过了它，因为它没有触发任何警报规则。 但回想起来，当时他的沙箱尚未设置为重定向 ACL 的数据源。 没有人应该知道这个节点的存在。

来源IP：金融支付网。 他无权触及这个范围。

他没有关闭终端。 他将三天手绘的ACL收集时间表推到了屏幕的左半边，并将警报拖到了右侧：端口22、443、8080，间隔12秒，三遍。

自动化资产发现工具。 但有一点他不喜欢：这个IP不是他随机发现的。 他的沙箱位于医疗保健集成网络内的透明网关后面。 正常的外部扫描不会通过那里。 除非扫描仪知道这个节点的存在。

Derek 输入了一个命令 - 将沙箱入口流量复制到隔离路径。

他没有阻止。 他等待着对方再次行动。

Leo 从 Derek 的节点收到了健康检查响应。 200 好的。 普通的。 但他注意到响应标头中的某些内容：nginx 版本，后跟来自医疗保健集成网关的默认标识符。 这不是他期望 ACL 节点提供的现成配置。

他又发出了第二个请求。 这次使用了自定义标头——其值格式对于金融支付系统来说是惯用的。

德里克看到了标题。 没有回复。 他对沙箱出口设置了一条规则——丢弃来自该 IP 的所有后续请求，不返回任何内容。 不是一个块。 一个测试。 他想看看对方对沉默有何反应。

里奥的刮刀陷入了沉默。

五秒钟。 八。 没有回应。 不是超时——主动丢弃。 利奥在遥测中停了下来。 安全工程师会默默地放弃，不给攻击者任何东西。 但德里克的做法是：先回应，然后吞下答复。 这是测试环境中的模拟服务器习惯。 留一个观察窗，看看对方是否走进来。

Derek 不是安全工程师。 他是一名测试工程师。

Leo 绕过了静默规则——通过数据出口上的反向端口进行探测。

德里克知道里奥已经解决了这个问题。

他的镜像端口捕捉到了旁路信号。 时间戳距离陷阱触发后不到三十秒。 他低声说了一件事——“你不是 ACL。”

Leo 的技术与 ACL 的收藏家签名相匹配。 但他绕过陷阱的方式是建筑师的习惯。 自下而上跟踪路由表，而不是从外到内遍历数据。

德里克做了一件事。 他向该金融范围 IP 发回了一个请求。 不是 HTTP。 自定义 ICMP 时间戳请求——大多数服务器默认回复，并且在应用层没有留下任何记录。 他没有发送数据。 他只是想确认一下：你能听到这个信号吗？

Leo 的探针捕获了入站 ICMP 请求：

[07-18 00:12:47] ICMP Type 13 (Timestamp Request)
SRC: medisys-sandbox-node.local → 10.88.*.47
TTL: 64 | No application-layer record

进入全屏模式 退出全屏模式

他停了下来。 试图躲避你的人不会发出信号。 设下陷阱的人也不会。

现在两个人都停在了屏幕前。

两人还不知道对方的名字。

利奥发出了最后一个请求。 无有效负载。 只是一个自定义的 HTTP 标头：

X-Not-ACL: true

进入全屏模式 退出全屏模式

该标头不在任何 RFC 中。

Derek盯着它看了大约四十秒。

然后他发回了相同的标头：

X-Same-Here: true

进入全屏模式 退出全屏模式

第二天。

第三届杯赛

利奥没有杀死探测器。 Derek 没有屏蔽该 IP。 他们之间有一条看不见的通道一直敞开着——两人都没有说过会再次使用它，但也没有关闭它。

利奥首先发送了一条消息——一个地址。 德里克熟悉这个地方——第三杯。

他没有回答。 他在午夜后出现。

第三杯的灯还亮着。 柜台后面的人看到两个人一前一后走了进来，没有说什么。 Leo面前出现了一杯Flat White，Derek这边则是一杯美式咖啡。

没有寒暄。

利奥首先发言。 他把他所有的东西放在桌子上——不是打印输出，而是他的手机屏幕。 点亮了。 被推到了中心。

  • 几个月前的 Slack 屏幕截图：CodeForge 事件审查外部观察员名单，其中一个条目为“自动化合规实验室”
  • 模型卡版本系列：acl-train-2026q2-v3，发布日期随后是 v4 的推出 — 相隔不到两周

“前十字韧带，”利奥说。 “这就是我所知道的一切。”

德里克看了三十秒。 然后他把自己的材料放到了桌子上。 不是截图。 他手绘的收藏时间表——三天，手绘草图，扫描成 PDF。

“ACL 收集器配置路径 — /etc/acl/collector.conf。 输出目标地址。 收集间隔：每四到六个小时一次。 目标 IP 排序：按字母顺序。 他们已经在至少三个不同的客户端环境中部署了相同的模板。”

他在“至少三个”处停了下来。 他知道结论是宽松的。

Leo看了一会儿桌子上他的模型卡，旁边是Derek的模型卡。 然后他把它推了回去。

“至少四个。”

德里克没有争辩。 他顿了顿，然后又提起第二件事。

“还有别的事。 三天前有人进入了我的沙箱。”

他给出了路径：/pulse/ingestion/。 来源不明。 没有有效负载，没有凭据。 干净——不是脚本，而是人工清理。 他是今天在查看出站日志时才发现的。

里奥没有说话。 他看着那条路。

柜台后面的人擦拭中间停顿了一下。 然后继续。

沉默延长了。 短的。 也许十秒。

Leo首先开口：“你的沙盒入口路径——你改变了吗？”

"No."

里奥没有回答。

他们坐在角落的隔间里，直到柜台后面的人擦完第三块玻璃。 没有握手。 没有“保持联系”。 但当他们走出去时，却朝着同一个地铁站走了几步——然后一个向东，另一个径直向北。

结语

利奥坐在车里，没有启动引擎。

他拿出手机。 截图还在他的相册里。

他将手机正面朝下放在仪表板上，然后启动了汽车。

他不知道Derek是否会坚持到底。 但德里克的沙箱入口路径仍然存在。 如果Derek不想让他回来，他昨晚就可以改变。 他没有。 这就是信号。

车子驶出了停车场。 仪表板的灯光掠过他的脸，然后就消失了。

他不确定自己是否会再次遇到那条/脉冲/摄入/路径。 但如果他这样做了，这次他就会认出来。

这就是《抓捕头目》——不是要抓住头目，而是要讲述当两个猎人瞄准同一个目标时会发生什么。 他们打了两回合。 都没有赢。 但他们证实了敌人的存在——而且他们不是彼此。
